etymology.description: 止(“foot”) + 一(“the beginning place”) -> originally 㞢 -> similar to 出 -> evolved as a variant of 之
etymology.interpretation: The character 𡳿 is a variant of 之(之) (zhī, "to go") and conveys the idea of movement or direction. The original form 㞢 combines 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") representing a footprint with 一(一) (yī, "the beginning place"), symbolizing the commencement of movement or journey, leading to the meaning of 'to go'. Over time, components such as the footprint evolved into different forms, leading to variants such as 𡳿.
